suppress.notes: file name: spring-boot-devtools-4.0.2.jar msg: False positive ?
file name: ejs:3.1.10 msg: Unavailable fix - No upgrade path available.
file name: vaadin-dev-bundle msg: Vaadin-bundled DOMPurify CVE tracked in upstream bundle.

file name: vite:7.3.1 msg: Vaadin 25.0.6 manages vite as a direct devDependency and resets it to 7.3.1 on prepare-frontend. Cannot override without Vaadin platform upgrade. Remove once Vaadin ships a release with vite >= 7.3.2.

file name: vite:7.3.1 msg: Vaadin 25.0.6 manages vite as a direct devDependency and resets it to 7.3.1 on prepare-frontend. Cannot override without Vaadin platform upgrade. Remove once Vaadin ships a release with vite >= 7.3.2.

file name: vite:7.3.1 msg: Vaadin 25.0.6 manages vite as a direct devDependency and resets it to 7.3.1 on prepare-frontend. Cannot override without Vaadin platform upgrade. Remove once Vaadin ships a release with vite >= 7.3.2.

file name: vite:7.3.1 msg: Vaadin 25.0.6 manages vite as a direct devDependency and resets it to 7.3.1 on prepare-frontend. Cannot override without Vaadin platform upgrade. Remove once Vaadin ships a release with vite >= 7.3.2.
